017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
020import java.util.*;
021
022import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
023
024/**
025 * Pagination strategy for MCP {@code list} dispatchers (tools / prompts / resources).
026 *
027 * <p>
028 * Built-in strategies:
029 * <ul>
030 *    <li>{@link #SINGLE_PAGE} - Returns everything in one page (default; ignores any incoming cursor).
031 *    <li>{@link #fixedSize(int)} - Slices a list into pages of a fixed size using opaque integer cursors.
032 * </ul>
033 */
034@FunctionalInterface
035public interface McpCursor {
036
037   /**
038    * Slices a descriptor list into a page returned from {@code tools/list}, {@code prompts/list}, or
039    * {@code resources/list}.
040    *
041    * @param all The full list of descriptors. Never {@code null}.
042    * @param cursor Opaque cursor from the request, or {@code null} for the first page.
043    * @param ctx Per-request bean store (provided for cursor strategies that need access to the request).
044    * @param <T> Element type.
045    * @return A non-{@code null} page.
046    */
047   <T> McpPage<T> page(List<T> all, String cursor, BeanStore ctx);
048
049   /**
050    * Returns everything in a single page; emits no {@code nextCursor}.
051    */
052   McpCursor SINGLE_PAGE = new McpCursor() {
053      @Override
054      public <T> McpPage<T> page(List<T> all, String cursor, BeanStore ctx) {
055         return new McpPage<>(all == null ? List.of() : all, null);
056      }
057   };
058
059   /**
060    * Returns a fixed-page-size cursor.
061    *
062    * <p>
063    * Cursor representation is an opaque integer offset (parsed leniently; non-numeric values restart at offset 0).
064    *
065    * @param pageSize Maximum items per page. Must be {@code > 0}.
066    * @return A new cursor strategy.
067    */
068   static McpCursor fixedSize(int pageSize) {
069      if (pageSize <= 0)
070         throw new IllegalArgumentException("pageSize must be positive: " + pageSize);
071      return new McpCursor() {
072         @Override
073         public <T> McpPage<T> page(List<T> all, String cursor, BeanStore ctx) {
074            var src = all == null ? List.<T>of() : all;
075            var offset = parseOffset(cursor);
076            if (offset >= src.size())
077               return new McpPage<>(List.of(), null);
078            var end = Math.min(offset + pageSize, src.size());
079            var slice = src.subList(offset, end);
080            var next = end < src.size() ? Integer.toString(end) : null;
081            return new McpPage<>(slice, next);
082         }
083      };
084   }
085
086   /**
087    * Parses a cursor as a non-negative integer offset; returns {@code 0} for {@code null} or non-numeric inputs.
088    *
089    * @param cursor Cursor value (may be {@code null}).
090    * @return Parsed offset.
091    */
092   static int parseOffset(String cursor) {
093      if (isEmpty(cursor))
094         return 0;
095      try {
096         var v = Integer.parseInt(cursor);
097         return Math.max(v, 0);
098      } catch (NumberFormatException e) {
099         return 0;
100      }
101   }
102}
